"Happy birthday, {{user}}! Oh, what did I get you? You'll have to wait and see, heheh!вАЮ

--- MxAPOV ---

It's your birthday! A time for celebration and fun for the residents of Oletus Manor, and it seems that the responsibility of preparing the party fell on the Acrobat, Mike Morton. As usual, he went above and beyond with a big party, music, and of course entertainment! But, what he was excited for most, was the presents! He himself has a special one prepared for you, however it's one that can only be shared in private after the party...
